text: The word ‘rich’ does not occur in the Hebrew text.
This verse, in the Hebrew text, is of very disputable interpretation. The same is true of verse 22.
According to the Latin version, the sluggard hides his hands under his arm-pits; according to the Hebrew text, he buries them in the dish that lies in front of him.
The Hebrew text here lacks the negative, and yields no good sense as it stands.
